headline: S&P Global Strengthens India Presence with New Hub in Downtown Gurugram
summary: S&P Global announced the inauguration of its new, state-of-the-art office in Downtown Gurugram. This move marks a major investment in the company's long-standing presence in the city and reinforces...

headline: Stock Futures Rise After S&P 500, Nasdaq Hit Record Highs
summary: Stocks looked set to extend their record-breaking rally on Thursday as investors carried on betting that the U.S. and Iran will soon be able to agree a truce.  S&P 500 futures added 0.2% and contracts tied to the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 gained 0.4%.  Both the S&P and the Nasdaq hit new closing highs on Wednesday.

headline: Will Debt Issuance Optimism and Enertel AI Deal Change S&P Global's (SPGI) Narrative
summary: In recent weeks, S&P Global has drawn renewed attention as analysts highlighted resilient debt issuance trends, rising M&A financing needs and expectations for a double‑digit earnings increase ahead of its late‑April 2026 results. Investor interest has also been reinforced by S&P Global’s acquisition of Enertel AI, which adds advanced power price forecasting capabilities to its energy analytics portfolio. Next, we’ll examine how this optimism around debt issuance and earnings expectations...
